title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Ipca Laboratories Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Ipca Laboratories Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
We at Ipca Laboratories Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Radiologist based out of Ahmedabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Ipca Laboratories Ventures Solutions:
Ipca Laboratories Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ipca Laboratories Ventures Solutions!
